mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, description, write_role, read_role, use_comment, use_like, use_tag, is_visible, is_deleted, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM site_board WHERE is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, code, name, description, write_role, read_role, use_comment, use_like, use_tag, is_visible, is_deleted, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM site_board WHERE is_deleted = FALSE AND is_visible = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, code, name, description, write_role, read_role, use_comment, use_like, use_tag, is_visible, is_deleted, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM site_board WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, code, name, description, write_role, read_role, use_comment, use_like, use_tag, is_visible, is_deleted, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM site_board WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_board ( code, name, description, write_role, read_role, use_comment, use_like, use_tag, is_visible, is_deleted, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{userRoleType}, #{readRoleType}, #{useComment}, #{useLike}, #{useTag}, #{isVisible}, #{isDeleted}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_board SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, write_role = #{userRoleType}, read_role = #{readRoleType}, use_comment = #{useComment}, use_like = #{useLike}, use_tag = #{useTag}, is_visible = #{isVisible}, sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE site_board SET is_deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
